rulings.Case Title: SEAN ROBERT D. ANGLES, AS TRUSTEE OF THE SEAN VS. ROBERT R. RUIZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 8, 2023 line 1. ATTORNEY'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL (RE: PLAINTIFF SEAN ROBERT D. ANGLES) is OFF CALENDAR. Proof of Service is invalid for two reasons (1) CRC 3.1362(d)(2) requires a declaration re: current electronic address and no such declaration is on file, and (2) service was untimely, whether for electronic mail or regular mail. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Defendant Mercy Housing Management Group Inc.'S Notice Of Demurrer To Plaintiff'S Third Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 8, 2023 line 2. PLAINTIFF ALLA KARABACH'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO STRIKE DEFENDANT MERCY HOUSING MANAGEMENT GROUP INC.'S NOTICE OF DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S THIRD AMENDED COMPLAINT is DENIED. Plaintiff did not show that the Demurrer was not drawn in conformity with the law. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). rulings.Case Title: SEAN SHEBBY VS. MARITZA HERRERA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 8, 2023 line 5. DEFENDANTS MARITZA HERRERA AND CHRIS HERRERA'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with leave to amend. A notice of errata is not an "amended pleading" within the meaning of CCP Section 472. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849).
